source.body_text_sample:

Careers

We understand that the environment we create for our people must reflect our corporate values: make a positive difference, do the right thing, and think creatively.

We aim to create a corporate culture where our people feel safe, motivated and supported in every aspect of their job role. We strive for our people to work within a culture that fosters innovative thoughts, the freedom to try new things and the support of senior leadership to do so.

It is understood by Algonquin and its subsidiaries that, by providing support, recognition and freedom to act, the potential of our organization as a whole is limitless.

Join our team

In order to view a full list of job opportunities you will be redirected to the Liberty career site.

Search opportunities
Recruitment fraud alert

We want to bring to your notice that Liberty follows extensive recruitment screening steps. Liberty does not charge/accept any amount or security deposit from job seekers during the recruitment process.

We have observed that there has been an increase in recruitment fraud involving scammers who post fraudulent jobs openings or contact job-seekers with fake job offers. These individuals sometimes even conduct fraudulent interviews to obtain personal information or money from the applicants.
